meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Your Freelance Workflow
content.seo_description: Break through the 'basic app' ceiling. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to automate complex builds and deliver high-end client software faster.
content.answer_block: To escape the cycle of building basic apps, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate architecture generation and complex refactoring. By defining custom skill sets, you transform your CLI into a senior-level partner, enabling you to ship production-ready, modular codebases in hours rather than weeks of manual boilerplate management.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the client project starts with promise, but quickly devolves into a slog of repetitive boilerplate and state management bugs. You’re trapped in the 'basic app' purgatory, where every hour spent debugging framework minutiae is an hour stolen from your bottom line and your creative freedom.

The shift from 'coder' to 'architect' isn't about writing more lines; it's about orchestrating better systems. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop fighting the syntax and start controlling the outcome. This setup isn't just a productivity hack—it's the competitive edge that separates the freelancers who struggle from those who scale.

steps.title: Define Architecture with Antigravity
steps.description: Before writing code, use Antigravity to generate a robust project structure that prevents future tech debt. This ensures your foundation is scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the business requirements for a scalable SaaS dashboard. Generate a modular folder structure and a dependency manifest that prioritizes clean architecture and type safety.

steps.title: Initialize Claude Code Context
steps.description: Point Claude Code to your newly generated architecture to ensure it understands your project constraints immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a summary of the project architecture for Claude Code to use as an onboarding context file.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to flesh out your core service layer, ensuring consistent patterns across your entire application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a set of CRUD services based on the schema defined in our architecture, adhering to the repository pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the service layer for the user module using the architecture defined in the context.'

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Contracts
steps.description: Use your setup to bridge the gap between frontend and backend, ensuring strict typing across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the API response types to match the database schemas defined in our Antigravity setup.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Sync API types with existing database entities and provide unit tests for validation.'

steps.title: Continuous Refactoring Loop
steps.description: Set up an automated review cycle where Claude Code audits your recent commits against the initial architecture goals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the last commit for architectural drift and suggest optimizations for performance and readability.

pro_tips: Always provide a 'style guide' file in your context to ensure Claude Code outputs code matching your preferred naming conventions.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative constraints' (what not to do) to prevent the AI from introducing unnecessary third-party dependencies.
Keep your context files small and modular; updating one specific file is more effective than dumping your entire codebase into the prompt.
Leverage Claude Code's `--verbose` flag during initial setup to debug how it interprets your architectural intent.
Create a 'session memory' script that summarizes the last 5 decisions made by Claude Code to prevent context drift during long sessions.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by applying this workflow to a small internal tool or a micro-service to calibrate your prompts before scaling to full-stack client production environments.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for the basic app trap and start delivering high-end architecture that commands premium rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
